spec.description: Lambda function monitoring — errors, RDS connection success/failure, and log explorer

spec.title: Successful RDS connections
spec.description: Count of log lines matching a successful DB connection. Requires your Lambda to log a success message e.g. 'DB connection established'.

spec.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /(?i)(connected|connection established|DB connection|database connected|RDS connected|acquired connection)/
| stats count() as successes by bin($period)

spec.title: Failed RDS connections
spec.description: Count of log lines matching a failed DB connection or timeout.

spec.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /(?i)(connection refused|could not connect|ECONNREFUSED|connection timeout|connection failed|unable to connect|Access denied|OperationalError|ETIMEDOUT)/
| stats count() as failures by bin($period)

spec.title: RDS DB connections (CloudWatch metric)
spec.description: Active connections on the RDS instance itself. High numbers can indicate connection pool exhaustion.

spec.title: RDS connection success vs failure over time

spec.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /(?i)(connected|connection established|DB connection|database connected|RDS connected|acquired connection)/
| stats count(*) as successes by bin(5m) as time_period
| sort time_period desc

fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /(?i)(connection refused|could not connect|ECONNREFUSED|connection timeout|connection failed|unable to connect|Access denied|OperationalError|ETIMEDOUT)/
| stats count() as failures by bin($period)

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /(?i)(ERROR|WARN|Exception|Traceback|fatal|critical)/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /(?i)(connect|RDS|database|postgres|mysql|aurora|pg|sequelize|knex|prisma|pool|ECONNREFUSED|ETIMEDOUT)/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

fields @timestamp, @message, @logStream
| filter @message like /(?i)(GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH|http|https|axios|fetch|request|response|status|statusCode|200|201|4[0-9]{2}|5[0-9]{2})/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

spec.title: Lambda · RDS connection & error monitoring OG
